name: homeassistant_custom_refrigerator_card
description: A standalone Home Assistant card for LG ThinQ refrigerators.

scripts.check: node --check src/homeassistant_custom_refrigerator_card.js && node --check dist/homeassistant_custom_refrigerator_card.js && node --check scripts/test-coverage.mjs && node --check tests/unit/test-helpers.mjs && node --check tests/unit/card.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node tests/validate.mjs && npm run test:unit
